summary:
The5%ers, founded in 2016 in Israel, offers one of the most flexible rule sets in the prop firm industry. News trading, weekend holding, and copy trading are all permitted — a trifecta that few firms allow simultaneously.

The standout feature is the Growth plan's 100% profit split, which scales as traders hit profit targets. Evaluation paths include 1-step, 2-step, and instant funding options, giving traders flexibility in how they enter the funded programme.

The main limitation is platform: MT5 only. Traders who rely on MT4 or cTrader will need to adapt. Fees are competitive, with a $5,000 account starting at $39.
pros: 100% profit split available on Growth plan
News trading, weekend holding, and copy trading all allowed
cons: MT5 only — no MT4 or cTrader
Smaller payout track record vs. FTMO
Stricter drawdown limits than many competitors (4% daily, 6% max)
bestFor: News traders, copy traders, and those wanting flexible evaluation options
notIdealFor: MT4 or cTrader users who cannot switch platforms

verdictBlocks.heading: Our Verdict
verdictBlocks.body: The5%ers is the best option for news traders and copy traders. The 100% profit split is genuinely unique in this space. The MT5-only restriction is its primary drawback — if you need MT4 or cTrader, look elsewhere.

faq.q: Can I trade the news on The5%ers?
faq.a: Yes — news trading is allowed on all The5%ers programmes.
On the Growth programme, as traders scale up their account, they can reach 100% profit split at higher tiers. The starting split is lower.

author: Editorial Team
